note: Each offering is one live KOL Wars market. Price is per delivered signed envelope. Prices are illustrative reference values for the ACP catalog; the underlying market is live at de9en.app.

offerings.name: kol-battle-odds
offerings.title: KOL Battle — live odds
offerings.returns: signed attention-signal envelope with yes/no odds, volume, mindshare_rank

offerings.name: mindshare-ranking
offerings.title: Attention mindshare ranking (top markets)
offerings.returns: ranked list of active markets by attention/volume with odds snapshots

offerings.name: volume-momentum
offerings.title: Volume momentum snapshot (single market)
offerings.returns: signed envelope with rolling volume delta and odds drift for one market
